languageDescription: Select your preferred language. You can change this later in Account settings.
aiWorkflowDescription: OpenToggl integrates with AI agents and coding assistants via CLI — let your AI track time automatically while you work. [See AI integration guide](https://opentoggl.com/docs/ai-integration)
configureWorkspaceDescription: Set up your workspace name, currency, and time tracking preferences in Settings. This helps organize your team's work.
starUsDescription: OpenToggl is open source and built by the community. If it saves you time, a GitHub star means the world to us.
